Description:

  • Safe & Secure Design: Crafted with rounded corners and a sturdy structure, the SMUG playpen ensures your pet’s safety while providing a comfortable space to play and relax.
  • Versatile Indoor/Outdoor Use: Perfect for home, backyard, or park outings, this playpen easily adapts to any environment, giving your pet the freedom to explore safely.
  • Durable & Easy-to-Clean Material: Made from high-quality, non-toxic plastic, our playpen is designed to withstand daily use. The smooth surface makes it effortless to wipe clean, ensuring a hygienic space for your furry friend.
  • Adjustable & Portable: Featuring a flexible design, this playpen can be arranged in various shapes and sizes to suit your needs. It folds flat for convenient storage and portability, making it ideal for travel.
  • Ideal For Small To Medium Dogs: Designed specifically for small to medium pets (up to 44 pounds), the SMUG fence provides your dog with plenty of room to move around and a safe place for your dog to play.
